headline: Is Estee Lauder's Fragrance Business Rising on Luxury Demand?
summary: EL's fragrance sales rise 6% organically in Q2 as TOM FORD, Le Labo and KILIAN PARIS fuel luxury-led growth across regions and channels.

raw.headline: Is Estee Lauder's Fragrance Business Rising on Luxury Demand?
raw.summary: EL's fragrance sales rise 6% organically in Q2 as TOM FORD, Le Labo and KILIAN PARIS fuel luxury-led growth across regions and channels.

headline: 4 Textile-Apparel Stocks Set to Benefit From Strong Industry Momentum
summary: Companies in the Zacks Textile - Apparel industry, including RL, VFC, CROX and COLM, are optimizing their omnichannel strategies and brand-building activities to solidify their market leadership.
